title: CAF Heterogeneity in Ovarian Cancer: Implications for Chemoresistance and Treatment Strategies.
snippet: Cancer-Associated Fibroblasts (CAFs) are key players in the tumor microenvironment (TME) of ovarian cancer, influencing progression and chemoresistance. Their heterogeneous subtypes contribute distinctly to immune evasion, extracellular matrix (ECM) remodelling, and drug resistance. This review synthesizes evidence from recent single-cell and proteomic anal...
